---
name: "Open Browser"
description: "Build and launch the app, then open it in the VS Code Simple Browser"
tools: ["execute/runTask"]
---

1. Run the VS Code task with id `shell: launch` in the workspace folder `d:\source\repos\donellmccoy\FormValidationExperiments`.
2. Then run the VS Code task with id `shell: open-browser` in the workspace folder `d:\source\repos\donellmccoy\FormValidationExperiments`.
